title: notelaea neglecta
intro: Notelaea neglecta, commonly known as the Forgotten Cherry, is a rare and endemic Australian tree species belonging to the family Apocynaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to combat various health issues. Health benefits associated with Notelaea neglecta include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. Notelaea neglecta can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
